class.name: PckDumper
class.brief_description: Extract files from Godot PCK archives.

method.name: check_md5_all_files
method.description: Verifies the MD5 checksum of every file in the loaded pack against the checksums stored in the archive header. Returns [code]OK[/code] if all checksums pass, [code]ERR_BUG[/code] if any file fails verification (the broken files are logged), or [code]ERR_SKIP[/code] if no PCK or embedded-EXE pack is loaded (checksums are not recorded for APK/ZIP/directory loads) or if every file's stored MD5 was empty.

method.name: pck_dump_to_dir
method.description: Extracts files from the loaded pack to [param dir], preserving their [code]res://[/code]-relative paths. If [param files_to_extract] is non-empty, only those [code]res://[/code]-rooted paths are extracted; otherwise every file is dumped. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success, or an error code if extraction fails.
